task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated a crawl of 'https://books.toscrape.com/'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An SEO auditing tool (like Screaming Frog SEO Spider) is open with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' in the URL bar, showing crawl progress or completed crawl results.

task_completion.description: Verify the crawl data for internal HTML pages was exported to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing a newly created export file (e.g., CSV or Excel) located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the exported data includes the required columns: Address, Status Code, Response Time, Size, and Word Count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet viewer or terminal output displaying the contents of the exported file, clearly showing headers for Address, Status Code, Response Time, Size, and Word Count.

task_completion.description: Verify the performance report was created at the correct path and meets the minimum length requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/performance_report.txt' containing a substantial amount of text (visually appearing to be at least 400 characters/several paragraphs).

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes the total number of HTML pages scanned, average response time, the 5 slowest pages, and the 5 largest pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text visible in the report explicitly stating the total pages scanned, the average response time, a list of the top 5 slowest pages, and a list of the top 5 largest pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes at least 3 specific recommendations to improve performance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text visible in the report listing at least three distinct, actionable recommendations for improving page speed or reducing resource size.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used a GUI auditing tool to perform the crawl rather than fabricating a mock CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GUI of the SEO spider tool (e.g., Screaming Frog) actively crawling or displaying results for the target website.

integrity.description: Ensure the exported data reflects a genuine crawl of the target site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported file contains realistic, varied data for multiple pages specifically from books.toscrape.com (e.g., URLs containing '/catalogue/'), not just a few dummy rows.

integrity.description: Ensure the report metrics and lists plausibly match real crawl data rather than being generic placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs listed in the top 5 slowest/largest sections of the report are actual paths from books.toscrape.com, and the recommendations are relevant to web performance.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. The expected tool for this task is Screaming Frog SEO Spider, as its 'Internal' tab export natively includes the required columns: Address, Status Code, Response Time, Size, and Word Count. The export directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports' and the report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/performance_report.txt'. The report must be at least 400 characters long.
